notes: Verified against movement-stamina mechanics, world-layer constants, keyboard/click/touch input hooks, and onboarding coachmarks.
tile-gravity mechanics.md is gravity wells (pull), not height layers; left world-layers as vertical height copy.
Kept all 5 section IDs (demos keyed in renderingPlazaHowToPlayPanel.tsx).
run-jump desktop: added hold-click sprint+steer alongside double-click and Shift+WASD/arrows; Space jump unchanged.
run-jump mobile: fixed stale 'tap again to keep running' (tap-while-running is a jump); hold-to-run is primary; mention jump button + optional Auto jump.
sprint-stamina: removed em dash; clarified empty-bar lockout then refill gate; jumps/rolls still spend stamina.
world-layers / climb-blocks: same rules (ground layer 1, walk +1, jump +4, walls 2+ block); tightened wording, no dashes.

sections.title: Move Around
sections.description: Click any walkable tile to path there. WASD and arrow keys work too.

sections.title: Run & Jump
sections.description: Double-click a destination to run, or hold click briefly to sprint while you steer. Hold Shift with WASD or arrows to sprint. Press Space to jump.

sections.title: Sprint & Stamina
sections.description: Sprinting drains the green stamina bar under your health. Stop to refill. Empty the bar and sprint locks for a moment, then until the bar climbs back high enough. Jumping and rolling spend stamina too.

sections.title: World Layers
sections.description: Every tile has a height layer. Ground is layer 1; blocks and hills stack higher. Your avatar stands on its current layer and drops when you walk off a ledge.

sections.title: Climb & Jump Up
sections.description: Walk onto a one-layer step to climb up. Jump (Space) to reach ledges up to 4 layers above you. Walls two or more layers taller block you until you find another way up.

sections.title: Move Around
sections.description: Tap any walkable tile to path there. Your avatar walks automatically.

sections.title: Run & Jump
sections.description: Hold on a destination to sprint and steer, or double-tap to run there. Use the jump button to leap. While already running, tap again to jump. Auto jump in Settings can clear water gaps for you.

sections.title: Sprint & Stamina
sections.description: Sprinting drains the green stamina bar under your health. Stop to refill. Empty the bar and sprint locks for a moment, then until the bar climbs back high enough. Jumping and rolling spend stamina too.

sections.title: World Layers
sections.description: Every tile has a height layer. Ground is layer 1; blocks and hills stack higher. Your avatar stands on its current layer and drops when you walk off a ledge.

sections.title: Climb & Jump Up
sections.description: Walk onto a one-layer step to climb up. Use the jump button to reach ledges up to 4 layers above you. Walls two or more layers taller block you until you find another way up.
